items.title: Palantir is reportedly helping the IRS investigate financial crimes
items.summary: The IRS has used Palantir's software since at least 2018, The Intercept reports.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: XChat, the standalone app for messaging on X, is available on iOS now
items.summary: XChat, the standalone app for accessing X's messaging feature, is available to download now for iOS . X first suggested it would be stripping direct messaging from X in 2025 , b...

items.title: Europe—not US—first to authorize Moderna's combo mRNA flu-COVID vaccine
items.summary: Amid RFK Jr.'s anti-vaccine agenda, Moderna withdrew its FDA application last year.
